rows.title: XTREME 12V MAX* Brushless Cordless Oscillating Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: Whether you're plunge cutting into your decking, trimming wood and floorboards, or sanding down furniture, this XTREME 12V MAX* Brushless Cordless Oscillating Tool delivers the adaptability and utility you need for consistent professional results. Its compact size and pro-grade construction is suited for a wide range of jobs while the brushless motor delivers up to 18,000 oscillations per minute (opm) with a 3.2 degrees oscillation angle. Take advantage of the easily maneuverable build and control offered by the variable speed trigger, with enhanced visibility provided by an integrated LED. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Convenient Portability - Lightweight and compact design
Enhanced Performance - Long runtime with brushless motor
Versatile Utility - Universal accessory adapter makes it compatible with most oscillating tool accessory brands
additional_features: Ease Of Attachment Changes - Quick-Change accessory system allows blades and attachments to be changed quickly without wrenches
Illuminates Dark Work Surfaces - Bright LED allows you to see better and can make for accurate cutting
Ease Of Use - Trigger lock on/off capability
Match Speed To Application - With use of variable speed trigger
includes: (1) DCS353 XTREME 12V MAX* Brushless Oscillating Tool
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 12 volts. Nominal voltage is 10.8.

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: This 20V MAX* brushless cordless oscillating multi-tool includes a universal accessory adaptor and two wood cutting blades to help get your project started. The DCS354 cordless oscillating multi-tool has a powerful brushless motor providing up to 57% more run time over a similar brushed tool. The Quick-Change accessory system allows you to change blades quickly and easily, and with the universal accessory adaptor, it's compatible with most oscillating tool accessories. The DUAL-GRIP variable speed trigger provides ultimate speed and application control. The bright LED light illuminates dark work spaces. Battery charger and tool guide system sold separately.
features: Brushless motor delivers up to 57% more run time over brushed
Dual-Grip variable speed trigger gives users ultimate speed and application control
Universal accessory adapter for use with most oscillating tool accessory brands
additional_features: Quick-Change accessory system allows blades and attachments to be changed quickly without wrenches
Bright LED Light illuminates dark work surfaces for accurate cutting
Bright LED light helps illuminates low-light work surfaces for accurate cutting
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 3-Speed Oscillating Multi-Tool (Tool Only)
rows.description: This 20V MAX* cordless kit includes one brushless 3-speed oscillating multi-tool with a universal accessory adaptor and two wood cutting blades to help get your project started. The DCS356 Oscillating Multi-Tool has a powerful brushless motor that provides up to 57% more runtime over a similar brushed tool. The 3-speed selector allows users to choose their speed setting based on application. The Quick-Change accessory system allows you to change blades quickly and easily, and with the universal accessory adaptor, it's compatible with most oscillating tool accessories. The DUAL-GRIP variable-speed trigger provides ultimate speed and application control. The bright LED illuminates dark workspaces. Battery, charger, and tool guide system sold separately.
features: The 3-speed selector allows users to choose their speed setting based on application
Brushless motor delivers up to 57% more runtime over brushed
Dual-Grip variable-speed trigger gives users ultimate speed and application control
additional_features: Universal accessory adapter for use with most oscillating tool accessory brands
Quick-Change accessory system allows blades and attachments to be changed quickly without wrenches
Bright LED illuminates dark work surfaces for accurate cutting
Bright LED light helps illuminate low-light work surfaces for accurate cutting
includes: (1) DCS356 20V Max* XR Brushless Cordless Oscillating Multi-Tool
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
